free_text: Ion beam activation of natCu, natTi, natNi and
measurement of product formation cross sections at
National Institute of Safety and Security,
natCu(0.002 cm thick, 99.9% pure and 8.9 g/cm3 density)
natTi(0.002 cm thick, 99.5% pure and 4.5 g/cm3 density)
natNi(0.002 cm thick, 99.0% pure and 8.9 g/cm3 density)
